incident def count_politicians(articles, politician_names):
incident import re
incident counts = {name: 0 for name in politician_names}
incident for article in articles:
incident clean_article = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', article.lower())
incident for name in politician_names:
incident name_lower = name.lower()
incident matches = re.findall(r'\b' + re.escape(name_lower) + r'\b', clean_article)
incident counts[name] += len(matches)
incident return counts
